Plan marks F3 as 'optional this run'.

production_outage_during_run.cause: docker restart on swarm-managed frappe_backend container orphaned the task; swarm dropped service endpoints; frappe_frontend nginx failed to resolve backend:8000.
production_outage_during_run.resolution: Remove orphan containers, docker service update --force for backend + frontend, re-apply hotpatch.
production_outage_during_run.new_hotpatch_convention: Use 'docker kill -s HUP <backend>' instead of 'docker restart' to reload gunicorn without detaching from swarm.
